question: Write a program that prompts the user to enter their first name, last name, and age. Then, print a greeting message displaying all the entered information in a formatted way.

test_cases.expected:
Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: 
--- Your Information ---
Name:    David Lee
Age:     45 years old
------------------------
Greeting: Hello, David! Welcome!

Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: 
--- Your Information ---
Name:    Sarah Connor
Age:     38 years old
------------------------
Greeting: Hello, Sarah! Welcome!
